goal: Final qualification of the microstructure-route into one of three honest statuses: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, or watchlist/reject.
global_constraints: All comparisons must use active-signal-v1@1 as the sole decision reference; @3 is auxiliary only.
Overlay and replacement tracks must never be mixed in the same narrative or snapshot.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile-based or selection-OOS with frozen lockbox.
All key comparisons must occur on the same window (same-window truth only).
Simple rules (bucket, threshold, quantile) must be tested before any model-based approach.
No re-opening of old routes: IV, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, or old-universe classification.
No new data families or data-universe expansion until microstructure qualification is complete.
Cannot claim microstructure-result as overlay unless signal IDs, entry timing, and base logic are preserved with microstructure applied only as veto/filter.
Cannot claim result as replacement unless compared as a separate snapshot against @1 on the same window.

slices.title: Freeze терминологии и correction log
slices.hypothesis: Establish a clean v12 project with corrected terminology and immutable reference, ensuring overlay and replacement are never conflated.
slices.objective: Establish a clean v12 project with corrected terminology and immutable reference, ensuring overlay and replacement are never conflated.
success_criteria: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and full open-items register.
evidence_requirements: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and full open-items register.

slices.title: Rebuild exact base @1 comparison frame
slices.hypothesis: Reconstruct the canonical base @1 run on the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11 to serve as the sole reference for all v12 comparisons.
slices.objective: Reconstruct the canonical base @1 run on the exact lockbox window used in v10/v11 to serve as the sole reference for all v12 comparisons.
success_criteria: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with complete trade-level detail.
evidence_requirements: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with complete trade-level detail.

slices.title: Threshold provenance and selection discipline
slices.hypothesis: Convert hand-tuned thresholds into a principled selection procedure with documented provenance for each candidate.
slices.objective: Convert hand-tuned thresholds into a principled selection procedure with documented provenance for each candidate.
success_criteria: Frozen threshold sets with full provenance documentation exist.
evidence_requirements: Frozen threshold sets with full provenance documentation exist.
